## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Added/updated a test for the change
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (`"dependencies"` stays empty)
- [ ] Updated the README / docs if the CLI surface changed
